title: Rama Rama Lyrics Selvanthan (Tamil)
stanzas:
hey sooriya vamsa
dheeranaana sundhara dhevan
maasilaa veeran

varamalithu kaatharulum
vasiyakaaran
mannil ulla manitharodu
manithanaaga dharma
thalaikka avatharitha
mahanubaavan
avanthan sri raamane

Hey rama raman
vandhutaaru da
saram thodukkum
siva dhanusha
thookkitaaru daa

boomi vaanam aadum paaruda
sri ramanukku eedu
solla inga yaarudaa

pada padavena vegathodu
paartha yaarum pullarikka
mada madavena osaiyodu
maayamaaga villudaithu
mana mana manamudithaar
janagarajan magalai thaanada

marama rama rama rama
rama rama raama
rama thoodhar pola
naamum ondru kooduvomaa

hey rajiyathai neenginaarada
.. kaadumalai yerinaaradaa
thaaipanitha sollukkaagave
sriramar ingu sodhanaigal
thaanginaaradaa

kidu kidu kidu pallamedu
paambu puli soolum kaadu
thada thada thada ennathodu
thayangidatha ullathodu
ulaga needhi meeridaamal
sodhaigal thaanginaaradaa

marama rama rama rama
rama rama raama
rama thoodhar pola
naamum ondru kooduvomaa

hey paathavudan thaakkuthe
thoondil visil kannaa
vairam pola thangam pola
vairam minnum mannaa

anbu raajane engal
aasai veerane
jenma jenmangal
thaandinaalum aasai
paarvai podhum

sada sadavena ambeduthu
saarai saaraiyaai thoduthu
kada kadvena valeduthu
tharmam vendru theemai saaya
patruthalai kaaranaiyum
padikalaiyum vaaithittaaradaa

marama rama rama rama
rama rama raama
rama thoodhar pola
naamum ondru kooduvomaa

seo.title: Rama Rama Lyrics Selvanthan (Tamil)

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Rama Rama'?

The song 'Rama Rama' conveys themes of devotion and reverence, celebrating the divine qualities of Lord Rama.

What is the context of this song in the movie Selvanthan?

In Selvanthan, the song plays a significant role in highlighting the spiritual journey of the characters, emphasizing their connection to faith.

Who are the singers of 'Rama Rama'?

The song features the talented voices of Manasi MM and Sooraj Santhosh.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for 'Rama Rama' was composed by the renowned Devi Sri Prasad (DSP).

When was 'Rama Rama' released?

'Rama Rama' was released on July 18, 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song 'Rama Rama' from the movie Selvanthan is a devotional piece that evokes a sense of peace and spirituality. It beautifully illustrates the characters' reverence for Lord Rama, encapsulating their emotional journey. The soothing melodies and heartfelt lyrics create an atmosphere of devotion, making it a perfect addition to any spiritual playlist. Overall, the song resonates with listeners, inviting them to reflect on their own faith and devotion.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Rama Rama from Selvanthan is a mesmerizing blend of soothing melodies and heartfelt lyrics that resonate deeply with listeners. Featuring the enchanting voices of Manasi MM and Sooraj Santhosh, this song beautifully captures the essence of devotion and spirituality. With Devi Sri Prasad's masterful composition, it promises to uplift your spirit and transport you to a serene realm.
stanzaMeanings: Hey, the sun's lineage is a beautiful warrior who is strong.
He is a great being who has come to guide people on earth, as a human being, to uphold righteousness.
Hey, Rama has come, and he has taken the bow of Shiva to start the battle.
The earth and sky are dancing; who will speak for Sri Rama here?
With speed, whoever sees the battlefield, the sound of the drums is echoing, and the people are celebrating.
Rama, Rama, Rama, like a messenger, shall we come together as one?
Hey, did you cross the kingdom? Did you climb the mountain? Sri Rama is here to face the challenges.
The snake and tiger are in the forest; the world is not to be swayed by injustice, and challenges are faced.
Rama, Rama, Rama, like a messenger, shall we come together as one?
Hey, with the path, the eyes shine like diamonds, and the wealth shines like diamonds too.
Dear king of love, our desires are brave; even if we are born again, just a glance is enough.
Hey, has he become a human being? Has Sri Ramachandra become a god?
He has removed all the evils in the world and has brought victory.
He has taken the essence of righteousness and has gathered the reasons and actions for justice.
Rama, Rama, Rama, like a messenger, shall we come together as one?
